query_normalized: kvarn: variance-normalized kv-cache quantization mitigates error accumulation in reasoning tasks computer science
rationale: The paper investigates how a KV‑cache manipulation (learned eviction) impacts long‑context reasoning performance, thus measuring a dependent variable (reasoning task accuracy/error) on the same KV‑cache domain as the user's interest in variance‑normalized KV‑cache quantization (criterion (b)).
